title: Crude oil gains as inventories fall and gasoline demand picks up
section_path: Crude oil gains as inventories fall and gasoline demand picks up
section_path_text: Crude oil gains as inventories fall and gasoline demand picks up
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Signs of robust demand helped assuage concerns that rising interest rates would curb economic growth. Supply issues are also in focus, amid the ongoing energy crisis. Image reference: $1.png | assets/2022-08-19_crude-oil-gains-as-inventories-fall-and-gasoline-demand-picks-up_img_241_c3b9728726bc.png
Aluminium gained after Europe's energy crisis claimed another victim.
